vocab.meaning: những vật dụng cần thiết cho việc di chuyển/hậu cần
vocab.example: My morning bag is crammed with logistical necessities like my laptop, lunch box, and a portable charger.

vocab.meaning: trút bỏ gánh nặng (vật chất hoặc tinh thần)
vocab.example: By the evening, I prefer to shed the load and switch to a much smaller bag to feel more liberated.
I adopt a minimalist approach for nighttime outings, carrying nothing more than my ID and some cash.

vocab.meaning: hoàn toàn mang tính chức năng/thực dụng
vocab.example: The items I lug around at 8 AM are strictly functional, geared entirely towards my professional duties.
I find carrying a backpack in the evening quite cumbersome when I’m trying to enjoy a sophisticated dinner.
I tend to strip away all the superfluous documents and gadgets that I usually keep in my briefcase during the day.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn về trang phục/phong cách ăn mặc
vocab.example: My evening carry is often a sartorial choice, meant to complement my outfit rather than just hold my belongings.
In the morning, I need an arsenal of items for my on-the-go lifestyle, including a travel mug and an umbrella.
I dislike being encumbered by heavy bags when I'm meeting friends for a late-night stroll.

vocab.meaning: những thiết bị điện tử không thể thiếu
vocab.example: My work bag is full of indispensable gadgets, whereas my evening clutch barely has room for my phone.
